tum_rgbd_freiburg3_walking_xyz.title: TUM RGB-D freiburg3_walking_xyz
tum_rgbd_freiburg3_walking_xyz.description: Dynamic indoor RGB-D sequence with moving people and handheld xyz camera motion.

tum_rgbd_freiburg3_walking_static.title: TUM RGB-D freiburg3_walking_static
tum_rgbd_freiburg3_walking_static.description: Dynamic indoor RGB-D sequence with walking people and near-static camera pose.

tum_rgbd_freiburg3_sitting_xyz.title: TUM RGB-D freiburg3_sitting_xyz
tum_rgbd_freiburg3_sitting_xyz.description: Indoor RGB-D sequence with a seated person, mild dynamic interference, and handheld xyz camera motion.

tum_rgbd_freiburg3_sitting_static.title: TUM RGB-D freiburg3_sitting_static
tum_rgbd_freiburg3_sitting_static.description: Indoor RGB-D sequence with a seated person, mild dynamic interference, and near-static camera pose.

bonn_rgbd_person_tracking.title: Bonn RGB-D person_tracking
bonn_rgbd_person_tracking.description: Dynamic RGB-D SLAM sequence with a moving person, suitable for dynamic filtering evaluation.
bonn_rgbd_person_tracking.size_note: official Bonn RGB-D Dynamic Dataset subset

bonn_rgbd_static.title: Bonn RGB-D static
bonn_rgbd_static.description: Static reference sequence from the Bonn RGB-D Dynamic Dataset.

bonn_rgbd_crowd.title: Bonn RGB-D crowd
bonn_rgbd_crowd.description: Dynamic RGB-D SLAM sequence with multiple pedestrians, suitable for semantic-generalization evaluation.

bonn_rgbd_kidnapping_box.title: Bonn RGB-D kidnapping_box
bonn_rgbd_kidnapping_box.description: Dynamic RGB-D sequence with a moved box, suitable for open-vocabulary dynamic-object evaluation.
